description: DayPage vNext — 全项目改进：外部信息源集成（统一 Ingest Gateway / API Key / Telegram / Claude Code hooks + MCP / RSS）、统计洞察仪表盘（知识/开发/足迹/成本四维度 + 周报）、现有功能补全（首页接真数据 / memo 详情页 / Settings 云同步 / 收口 coming soon）、架构与工程质量（iOS↔Web 统一 / pgvector / 安全 / 可观测性）。Source: docs/PRD-vNext.md + tasks/prd-wave0~4*.md。所有 story 单次迭代可完成，按依赖排序：schema → 后端 → UI → 聚合。

userStories.title: 修复 sendEvent 在 dev 的静默 no-op
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to be warned when an Inngest event is dropped locally so memos don't silently fail to compile.
acceptanceCriteria: web/src/lib/inngest/client.ts 的 no-op 分支（dev 且无 INNGEST_EVENT_KEY）加 console.warn，提示需启动 dev:inngest 或设 INNGEST_EVENT_KEY
在 web/AGENTS.md 或 web README 文档化本地需同时跑 npm run dev 与 npm run dev:inngest
warn 信息包含具体修复指引（端口 8288 / 环境变量名）
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 首页统计卡接入 /api/stats
userStories.description: As a user, I want the home stats cards to show my real numbers so the dashboard reflects my actual data.
acceptanceCriteria: home/page.tsx 的 4 个写死数字（sources/wiki pages/domains/backlinks）改为调用 GET /api/stats
周 delta（+12 this week 等）来自 stats 端点真实 delta，移除写死值
新用户（数据为空）显示 0 与引导，而非假数字
移除 home/page.tsx:138-156 的写死常量
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 首页 Recent activity 接入 /api/activities
userStories.description: As a user, I want recent activity to show what actually happened so I can track real progress.
acceptanceCriteria: 移除 home/page.tsx:68-75 的写死 recent 数组
改为调用 GET /api/activities（读 change_log），按时间倒序展示
每条活动的目标链接指向真实存在的路由
无活动时显示已有空态
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 首页 What the system noticed 接入 inbox_items
userStories.description: As a user, I want the observations section to show real AI-detected items so I can act on them.
acceptanceCriteria: 移除 home/page.tsx:42-65 的写死 observations 数组
改为查询 inbox_items（kind ∈ contradiction/schema/orphan，status=open）取最多 N 条
按钮接通真实端点：resolve→/api/inbox/[id]/resolve、dismiss→/api/inbox/[id]/dismiss、snooze→/api/inbox/[id]/snooze
无 observation 时显示已有空态
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 首页 Domains at a glance 接入真实 domain
userStories.description: As a user, I want the domains section to show my real domains and page counts.
acceptanceCriteria: 移除 home/page.tsx:77-89 的 domainsMock 与写死 sparks
改为调用 GET /api/domains，每个 domain 显示真实 page 计数
sparkline 用真实趋势或明确静态降级（不用假数据）
All domains 按钮接通跳转或移除 disabled
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 新建 memo 详情页路由 /memos/[id]
userStories.description: As a user, I want to click a memo and view its detail so I can see the original input and what it became.
acceptanceCriteria: 新建 web/src/app/(app)/memos/[id]/page.tsx，server component，按 user 鉴权
通过 GET /api/memos/[id] 取 memo，缺失时 notFound()
展示 body 原文、type、origin/device、created_at、location、weather
通过 page_sources 反查并链接到该 memo 编译产出的 pages
RecentlyCompiled.tsx:67 与 CompileQueue.tsx:292 的链接点击不再 404
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: memo 详情页附件展示
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a memo's attachments so I can review photos and listen to voice notes.
acceptanceCriteria: memo 详情页展示图片缩略图（若有 photo attachment）
展示语音播放控件 + transcript（若有 audio attachment）
无附件时不渲染附件区
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: memo 详情页 recompile 与删除操作
userStories.description: As a user, I want to recompile or delete a memo from its detail page.
acceptanceCriteria: Recompile 按钮调 POST /api/memos/[id]/recompile，触发后显示状态变化
Delete 按钮调 DELETE /api/memos/[id]，带二次确认对话框，删除后跳回上一页
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 新增 api_keys 表与迁移
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to store hashed API keys so external sources can authenticate.
acceptanceCriteria: 新增 api_keys 表：id, user_id(FK CASCADE), name, key_hash, prefix, scopes(jsonb), last_used_at, created_at, revoked_at
key_hash 存 sha256，明文不入库；prefix 存前 8 位
生成并运行 drizzle 迁移成功
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 新增 memos 幂等字段 source_channel / external_id
userStories.description: As a developer, I need memos idempotent per external source so retries don't duplicate.
acceptanceCriteria: 新增 memos.source_channel(text, nullable)、memos.external_id(text, nullable)
建唯一索引 (user_id, source_channel, external_id)（external_id 非空时生效）
生成并运行迁移成功
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 新增 ingest_sources 表与迁移
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to store external source bindings so Telegram/RSS connections persist.
acceptanceCriteria: 新增 ingest_sources 表：id, user_id(FK CASCADE), channel, config(jsonb), enabled, created_at
config 中敏感字段（如 telegram token）加密存储，不明文落库
生成并运行迁移成功
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: API Key 鉴权中间件
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a reusable way to authenticate Bearer-token requests so ingest endpoints can identify the user.
acceptanceCriteria: 新增 helper：解析 Authorization Bearer dp_xxx，sha256 后比对 api_keys.key_hash
解析出 user_id + scopes 注入上下文；无效/已撤销 key 返回 401
命中后更新 last_used_at
复用 web/src/lib/ratelimit.ts，按 key 维度限流
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: API Key 管理端点 /api/keys
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create and revoke API keys via API.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/keys（session 鉴权）：创建 key，明文仅响应中返回一次，库里只存 hash
GET /api/keys：列出当前用户 key（只返回 prefix/name/last_used/created）
DELETE /api/keys/[id]：撤销（置 revoked_at）
所有端点强制 user 隔离
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 统一 Ingest 端点 POST /api/ingest
userStories.description: As an external system, I want to POST content to DayPage so it becomes a memo.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/ingest（PAT 鉴权，scope memo:write）
接受 NormalizedInput 子集，最少 { body }；zod 校验、大小限制、HTML 清洗
落 memo 时 origin=api，记录 source_channel
带 external_id 时重复推送返回已存在 memo（幂等）
创建后发 memo/created 事件触发编译；无效 key 401，超限 429
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: 源配置端点 /api/sources
userStories.description: As a user, I want to manage my external source bindings via API.
acceptanceCriteria: GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/sources（session 鉴权，user 隔离）
读写 ingest_sources，敏感 config 加密
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Settings 页 API Key 管理 UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to manage my API keys in settings so I can connect external tools.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings 新增 API Keys 区块
生成按钮弹窗显示一次性明文 key（含复制按钮 + 只显示一次警告）
列表显示已有 key（name/prefix/last used），每行撤销按钮带确认
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Telegram webhook 端点 + Adapter
userStories.description: As a user, I want messages I send to my DayPage bot to become memos.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/ingest/telegram，用 Telegram secret_token 校验来源
Adapter 归一化 update：文本→text、含URL→url、语音→getFile下载→走 Whisper、图片→photo（含 caption）
通过 telegram_chat_id 在 ingest_sources 查到 user_id；未绑定被拒
复用 /api/ingest 内部逻辑落 memo（source_channel=telegram，external_id=message id 幂等）
不引入重型 telegram SDK，直接用 Bot API + fetch
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Telegram 绑定流程 UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to connect my Telegram account to DayPage securely.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings 连接 Telegram：生成一次性绑定码，提示发 /start code 给 bot
bot 收到 /start code 后把 chat_id 与 user_id 绑定写入 ingest_sources
绑定成功后显示已连接状态，可一键解绑
绑定码有过期时间，用过即失效
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Claude Code hook 脚本
userStories.description: As a developer, I want my Claude Code sessions to auto-log to DayPage so my coding work is captured.
acceptanceCriteria: 新增 integrations/claude-code/daypage-hook.js：读取 hook 会话上下文，调 POST /api/ingest（带 API key）
body 为会话摘要，默认只发摘要不发代码原文
memo metadata 带 { repo, branch, files_touched, session_duration, tools_used }
source_channel=claude-code，external_id=会话 id 幂等
API key 从本地 env 读，不硬编码；提供 redaction 配置
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Claude Code hook 配置文档
userStories.description: As a developer, I want clear instructions to register the hook so setup is reproducible.
acceptanceCriteria: integrations/claude-code/README.md 说明如何在 ~/.claude/settings.json hooks 注册（Stop 事件）
含 API key 获取步骤（指向 DayPage Settings）
含 redaction 配置示例
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: DayPage MCP server 骨架
userStories.description: As a developer, I want DayPage exposed as an MCP server so Claude Code can use it as a tool.
acceptanceCriteria: 新增 integrations/mcp-server/，用 @modelcontextprotocol/sdk，stdio transport
通过 PAT 调 DayPage API（不直连 DB）
可被 Claude Code 发现并列出工具
README 说明如何在 Claude Code 注册
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: MCP 工具 daypage_search
userStories.description: As a developer using Claude Code, I want to search my DayPage knowledge base.
acceptanceCriteria: daypage_search(query) 经 API 走现有 RAG，返回相关 pages（slug/title/excerpt）
在 Claude Code 调用返回真实结果
无 key/网络错误有清晰报错
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: MCP 读写工具集
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to read and write DayPage from Claude Code.
acceptanceCriteria: daypage_get_page(slug) 读单页
daypage_add_memo(body, type) 走 /api/ingest 写 memo
daypage_list_recent(n) 返回最近 memo/pages
daypage_graph_neighbors(slug) 返回 page_links 邻居
每个工具有输入校验与错误处理
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: /insights 页面骨架 + 时间范围切换
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dashboard page so I can review my activity at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: 新建 (app)/insights/page.tsx，加入侧边栏导航
时间范围切换：今天/本周/本月/全部（状态存 URL params）
复用 Card/Sparkline/Chip/SectionLabel
各维度无数据时优雅降级（空态或连接 X 解锁）
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: insights 知识活动维度
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my knowledge-building activity.
acceptanceCriteria: memo 录入趋势（日/周折线）：memos.created_at group by day
编译成功率：compile_status 占比
知识图谱增长：pages + page_links 按周累计
活跃概念 Top N：pages.backlink_count desc；领域分布：pages.domain_id group by
聚合查询用 SQL group by 而非应用层循环
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: insights 开发活动维度
userStories.description: As a developer, I want stats about my coding activity so I get an automatic work summary.
acceptanceCriteria: 新增开发活动区块：会话数（日/周趋势）、touched repos 分布、会话时长累计、常用工具
数据源为 memos where source_channel=claude-code 的 metadata 聚合（jsonb 操作符）
无 Claude Code 数据时显示连接引导（优雅降级）
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: insights 系统/成本维度（点亮 prompt_log）
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my LLM usage so I understand compilation cost.
acceptanceCriteria: 新增聚合读取 prompt_log：token 用量（in/out）、按 kind、按 model 分布
时间范围内 token 趋势 sparkline
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: insights 活动流分页组件
userStories.description: As a user, I want a real activity feed with load-more so I can browse history.
acceptanceCriteria: 复用 /api/activities 读取真实活动，支持加载更多分页
与首页 Recent activity 数据一致
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 自动周报 cron 函数
userStories.description: As a user, I want a weekly recap generated automatically so I don't summarize myself.
acceptanceCriteria: 新增 Inngest cron（复用 daily-page.ts 模式），每周运行一次
为有数据用户生成 type=synthesis 复盘 page：本周 memo/pages/链接增量、主要主题
周报 page 可在 /insights 顶部展示；无数据用户跳过
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Settings 云同步端点与接线
userStories.description: As a user, I want my settings to sync across devices so I don't reconfigure each time.
acceptanceCriteria: 新增 GET/PATCH /api/settings，落 users.settings jsonb
SettingsClient.tsx 从 localStorage 升级为读写后端（保留 localStorage 作即时缓存）
同步项：主题、密度、AI 模型偏好、通知设置
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 暗色主题
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dark theme so the app is comfortable at night.
acceptanceCriteria: 实现暗色调色板（CSS token 已是变量，加 dark 变体）
移除 SettingsClient.tsx:303 的 disabled，主题选择生效
切换即时生效并随云同步持久化
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 收口 wiki Ask about this page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to ask the wiki about a page so I can explore it conversationally.
acceptanceCriteria: wiki/[slug]/page.tsx:364 的按钮接通：带页面上下文跳转 /chat 新线程
移除 disabled / coming soon 状态
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 收口 add 语音输入
userStories.description: As a user, I want voice input on the add page so I can capture by speaking.
acceptanceCriteria: UnifiedInput.tsx:558 语音输入接通：录音→Whisper transcribe（LLM 层已有）
或明确移除按钮（若本迭代不实现），不留 disabled 假功能
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 统一 memo schema（解决 iOS↔Web 错配）
userStories.description: As a developer, I need iOS and Web memo models aligned so sync doesn't lose data.
acceptanceCriteria: Web schema 增补 iOS 独有字段：mood、entity_mentions（或并入 metadata）
memos.type 枚举对齐（处理 iOS 的 location/mixed：新增或映射）
memo_attachments.exif 改为结构化 jsonb 用法
生成并运行迁移成功
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: iOS 实现 bulk 同步客户端
userStories.description: As an iOS user, I want my memos to sync to the cloud so they appear on web.
acceptanceCriteria: iOS 新增同步服务，调用现有 POST /api/memos/bulk（last-write-wins by updated_at）
上行本地 vault memo（含 location/weather/device/结构化 EXIF）
用 devices 表注册设备 + sync_state.cursor 增量同步
离线排队，联网补传
iOS build passes（xcodebuild -scheme DayPage，iPhone 17 模拟器）
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 附件上行对象存储
userStories.description: As a user, I want my photos/voice available on web too.
acceptanceCriteria: 选定对象存储（S3/R2/Supabase Storage）并配置
iOS 本地 asset 上传，回填 memo_attachments.storage_key
Web memo 详情页能展示这些附件
上传失败可重试
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 编译收归 Web（消除双管道）
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a single compilation pipeline so outputs don't diverge.
acceptanceCriteria: 废弃 iOS CompilationService/BackgroundCompilationService（或降级为离线草稿+联网补编译）
iOS 改为拉取 Web 编译结果（pages/daily）展示
同一天不再被两套管道重复编译
iOS build passes；端到端：iOS 记录→同步→Web 编译→iOS 看到结果
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: embedding 迁移 pgvector
userStories.description: As a developer, I want vector search to scale so recall/RAG stays fast.
acceptanceCriteria: 启用 pgvector 扩展
pages.embedding/memos.embedding 从 text(JSON) 改 vector(1536)，加 ivfflat/hnsw 索引
迁移脚本把现有 JSON 文本转 vector
rag.ts 与 compile-memo recall step 改用 SQL 近邻查询
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: insights 生活/数字足迹维度
userStories.description: As a nomad, I want to see my location/photo footprint so I can review where I've been.
acceptanceCriteria: 位置足迹：memos.location lat/lng 打点/城市时间线
天气-记录关联：memos.weather × created_at；记录时间节律：created_at 按小时分布
摄影统计：memo_attachments.exif（光圈/快门/ISO/焦距）；设备来源分布：device/origin
无 iOS 数据时优雅降级
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 安全加固：iOS GitHub token 下沉 + 输入清洗
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to remove hardcoded secrets and harden inputs.
acceptanceCriteria: iOS GitHub bot token 从 FeedbackService 硬编码下沉到后端代理端点，iOS 不再持有 token
外部 ingest 输入严格 zod 校验 + 大小限制 + HTML 清洗（XSS）
限流扩展到所有 ingest 与新端点；ingest_sources.config 敏感字段加密
webhook 校验齐全（Telegram secret_token / Inngest 签名）
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 可观测性：日志 + 健康检查
userStories.description: As a developer, I want visibility into pipeline health and cost.
acceptanceCriteria: Web 接入 Sentry/日志聚合（iOS 已有 Sentry）
编译管道加结构化日志 + step 级计时
新增健康检查端点：DB/Inngest/LLM provider 可达性
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: RSS 源接入
userStories.description: As a user, I want RSS feeds to flow in automatically so new articles become memos.
acceptanceCriteria: ingest_sources 存 feed URL + 新增 Inngest cron 拉取各用户 feed
新条目→url memo（external_id=item guid 幂等）
可选 light 模式只存摘要
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
